```{r}
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE)

predictMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=cbind(insight::get_data(model1),
                                                               StimID=marginaleffects::get_modeldata(model1)$StimID),
                                                  by=c("StimID", "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents", "UASType",
                                                       "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - predictMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)
R2means

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=predictMeans,
                    measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                    measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')
eRMSE

predictMeans2 <- cbind(predictMeans, response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean, responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                       responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans2) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=2.5, shape=4, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +

  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(round(R2means, 3)))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3)), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3)), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)


# fit log events model for comparison

model1lgQ <- update(model1, . ~ . -I(UASEvents^-1) + I(log10(UASEvents)))

rngUASLAEMaxLRScl <- range(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)

model1predictType <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                        variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASType", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictOp <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEnv <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt2 <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12), UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt2_Q <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1lgQ, newdata=insight::get_data(model1lgQ),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12), UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1lgQ, type="bias-corrected"))

p1 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictType, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASType, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p2 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictOp, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASOperation, shape=UASOperation),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASOperation), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASOperation), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(9, 6, 2)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p3 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEnv, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=AmbientEnv, shape=AmbientEnv),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AmbientEnv), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AmbientEnv), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(1, 3)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(y="Mean change in annoyance")


p4 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEvt, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight')) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight'),
                         aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASEvents)), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASEvents)), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatMod"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


p3b <- p3 + theme(axis.title.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.text.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                  axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour="black", linewidth=1)) + 
        labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)))

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEnv"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# add faint dashed grey major grid lines to p1, p2, p3, p4 and remove minor grid lines and point data
p1 <- p1 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p1, "GeomPoint")
p2 <- p2 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p2 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p2, "GeomPoint")
p3 <- p3 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p3 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p3, "GeomPoint")
p4 <- p4 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p4 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p4, "GeomPoint")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModGrid"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


p5 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park")) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.8,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &
                                       UASOperation=='Overflight' & SessionPart=='B'),
                         aes(x=UASEvents, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=UASLAEMaxLR, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
  
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                          aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_ribbon(data=subset(model1predictEvt2_Q, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                          aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          linewidth=0.5, linetype=3, fill=NA, alpha=0.25) +
              
              geom_line(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                        aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +
  
              geom_line(data=subset(model1predictEvt2_Q, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                        aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), alpha=0.5,
                        linewidth=1, linetype=3) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type"), reverse=FALSE) +
            
              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")

p5

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEvtComp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```

### Model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}


mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.resP <- residuals(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                                                     type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
              residual_vals=mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.resM <- residuals(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                                                     type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                    clusterVar=mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.Cook <- cooks.distance(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                                                          plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                    clusterVar=mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

hist(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.resP, breaks=20, main="Standardised Pearson residuals")

mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.DfBc <- dfbeta(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                                                  level='clusters', coefs=c('UASLAEMaxLRScl'))
mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE.DfBo <- dfbeta(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                                                  level='observations', coefs=c('UASLAEMaxLRScl'))


performance::check_collinearity(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE)
performance::check_heteroskedasticity(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE)
performance::check_outliers(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE,
                            method=c('cook', 'pareto', 'zscore', 'zscore_robust',
                                     'ci', 'eti', 'hdi', 'bci', 'mahalanobis', 'lof'))

```

### with personal factors

```{r}

model1 <- mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ TrialNumberScl +
                                                                       UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv +
                                                                       UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                                  UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASOperation +
                                                                    UASType +
                                                                    NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2,
                                                                data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                                family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                                id=ID,
                                                                corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE, mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE)

predictMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=cbind(insight::get_data(model1),
                                                               StimID=marginaleffects::get_modeldata(model1)$StimID),
                                                  by=c("StimID", "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents", "UASType",
                                                       "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - predictMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)
R2means

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=predictMeans,
                    measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                    measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')
eRMSE

predictMeans2 <- cbind(predictMeans, response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean, responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                       responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans2) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=2.5, shape=4, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +

  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(round(R2means, 3)))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3)), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3)), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)


# fit log events model for comparison
model1lgQ <- update(model1, . ~ . -I(UASEvents^-1) + I(log10(UASEvents)))


rngUASLAEMaxLRScl <- range(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)

model1predictType <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                        variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASType", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictOp <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEnv <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt2 <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12), UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt2_Q <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1lgQ, newdata=insight::get_data(model1lgQ),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12), UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1lgQ, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictNat <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                     variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                     by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "NationGeo2"),
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictAtt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                     variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                     by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AAM_attitude2"),
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

p1 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictType, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASType, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p2 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictOp, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASOperation, shape=UASOperation),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASOperation), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASOperation), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(9, 6, 2)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p3 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEnv, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=AmbientEnv, shape=AmbientEnv),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AmbientEnv), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AmbientEnv), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(1, 3)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(y="Mean change in annoyance")


p4 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEvt, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight')) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight'),
                         aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASEvents)), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASEvents)), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatMod"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


p3b <- p3 + theme(axis.title.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.text.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                  axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour="black", linewidth=1)) + 
        labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)))

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEnv"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# add faint dashed grey major grid lines to p1, p2, p3, p4 and remove minor grid lines and point data
p1 <- p1 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p1, "GeomPoint")
p2 <- p2 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p2 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p2, "GeomPoint")
p3 <- p3 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p3 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p3, "GeomPoint")
p4 <- p4 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p4 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p4, "GeomPoint")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModGrid"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


p5 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park")) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.8,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &
                                       UASOperation=='Overflight' & SessionPart=='B'),
                         aes(x=UASEvents, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=UASLAEMaxLR, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
  
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                          aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_ribbon(data=subset(model1predictEvt2_Q, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                          aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          linewidth=0.5, linetype=3, fill=NA, alpha=0.25) +
              
              geom_line(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                        aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +
  
              geom_line(data=subset(model1predictEvt2_Q, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                        aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), alpha=0.5,
                        linewidth=1, linetype=3) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type"), reverse=FALSE) +
            
              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")

p5

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEvtComp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

p6 <- ggplot(data=model1predictNat) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=NationGeo2), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=NationGeo2), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Nation. region", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Nation. region", reverse=FALSE)) +
  
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p6

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnNatMod"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))

p7 <- ggplot(data=model1predictAtt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AAM_attitude2), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AAM_attitude2), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="AAM attitude", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="AAM attitude", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")
```
